assessment.note: Names a specific missing direction in feedback — stronger guidance on concept rationale over execution speed — which is a strong clarity gap; also reveals a growth thread worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Expectation mismatch
new_queue.name: Where do your standards for good work differ from mine right now?
new_queue.description: Names a likely source of misalignment without softening the gap.

new_queue.label: Blocked practice
new_queue.name: What part of concept rationale feels hardest to improve right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific growth block inside concept rationale rather than a vague development wish.

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: What would better concept rationale look like in your work over the next few weeks?
new_queue.description: Ends on an actionable commitment tied to the discussion.
